title: Sillunu Oru Sandhippu
overview: Ashok and Geetha fall in love and vow to get back together as adults when their parents force them apart. Years later, Ashok becomes engaged to Charu and the wedding plans go smoothly until Geetha suddenly returns to Ashok's life.
